arguments.command:
python - <<'PY'
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta
now = datetime.now(timezone.utc).astimezone(timezone(timedelta(hours=8)))
this_week=185
last_week=198
impr=(last_week-this_week)/last_week*100
if abs(impr) < 1:
    verdict='stable'
elif impr>0:
    verdict='improved'
else:
    verdict='degraded'
print(now.isoformat(timespec='seconds'))
print(impr)
print(verdict)
PY
